linkedin.text:
800 people. Three days. Zero logistics complaints to the client.

The brief was simple to say and brutal to execute: fly 800 top performers to Mallorca, make three days feel effortless, lose no one, miss no minute.

The build behind "effortless": 14 chartered transfers, 800 rooms across two resorts, a beachfront gala for the full group — choreographed so the guests only ever saw the experience, never the machine running it.

The proof: a 96% post-trip satisfaction score, and not one logistics issue ever reached the client's desk. That's the line that matters. The complexity is our job, not theirs.

This is what "from business to pleasure" looks like at scale. Planning a large-group incentive and quietly worried it can't run this clean? It can — and that's the whole point of working with a production partner.

Book a free scoping call (link in bio) or DM "INCENTIVE" and we'll map it with you.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventProduction

facebook.text:
How do you move 800 people to Mallorca and have nobody notice the work behind it? 🎯

The brief: three days that feel effortless, no one lost, no minute missed. The reality behind it: 14 chartered transfers, 800 rooms across two resorts, and a beachfront gala for the whole group — ending in a 96% satisfaction score and zero logistics complaints reaching the client.

That's "from business to pleasure" at scale: the guests get the experience, we carry the complexity.

image_prompt: Elevated wide shot from behind a crowd of around 800 corporate guests filling a grand Mallorca seaside venue at night, all viewed from the rear so faces are tiny, warm amber stage glow ahead of them washing over the sea of heads, palm silhouettes framing the edges, dark Balearic coastline and night sky beyond.
